SDL2 + Pixie-backed canvas implementation.

Pixie draws into an ARGB pixel buffer; SDL2 blits that buffer to the window each frame. Anti-aliased shapes and real font rendering on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

Note: both pixie (via bumpy) and sdl2 ship a Rect type, and my geometry module exports one too. So this file uses explicit qualification to keep them straight: geometry.Rect, geometry.rect() for ours; pixie.rect() for Pixie's; SDL types only via sdl2.X aliases.

Imports

../foundation/render_object, ../foundation/geometry

Types

SdlCanvas = ref object of Canvas
  image*: Image
  ctx*: Context
  window*: WindowPtr
  renderer*: RendererPtr
  texture*: TexturePtr
  fonts*: Table[string, Font]
  defaultFont*: Font
SDL2 + Pixie canvas. Drawing operations go through Pixie into image; once per frame present() swizzles the buffer into the streaming texture and copies it to the window. 
SdlSubCanvas = ref object of Canvas
  image*: Image
  ctx*: Context
  fonts*: Table[string, Font]
  defaultFont*: Font
  texture*: TexturePtr
  textureDirty*: bool
Off-screen sub-canvas: a Pixie image with no SDL window. RepaintBoundary draws into one of these and then composites the result onto its parent canvas. The parent's compositeSubCanvas does the upload-and-blit so the per- frame cost of a clean boundary is a single GPU operation.

Vars

sdlRRectCache {.threadvar.}: Table[SdlRRectKey, SdlRRectEntry]
sdlRRectCacheHits {.threadvar.}: int
sdlRRectCacheLimit = 512
Cap on number of cached rrect bitmaps. Clears wholesale on overflow. 
sdlRRectCacheMisses {.threadvar.}: int
sdlTextCache {.threadvar.}: Table[SdlTextCacheKey, SdlTextCacheEntry]
sdlTextCacheHits {.threadvar.}: int
sdlTextCacheLimit = 2048
Maximum number of rasterized text bitmaps to keep. Eviction is "drop everything when full" today; LRU is a follow-up. 
sdlTextCacheMisses {.threadvar.}: int
Per-thread counters; useful for confirming the cache actually hits in interactive workloads.

Procs

proc clearSdlRRectCache() {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc clearSdlTextCache() {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Drops every rasterized text image from the SDL canvas cache. 
proc disposeSubCanvas(s: SdlSubCanvas) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Releases the SDL texture this sub-canvas holds. Safe to call multiple times. Call when a RepaintBoundary is unmounted to avoid leaking GPU memory; otherwise the texture stays alive until the SDL renderer itself is destroyed. 
proc newSdlCanvas(window: WindowPtr; renderer: RendererPtr; w, h: int;
                  defaultFontPath: string = ""): SdlCanvas {.
    ...raises: [PixieError], tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}

Constructs an SdlCanvas.

Inputs:

  • window, renderer: live SDL2 handles obtained via createWindow / createRenderer.
  • w, h: surface size in pixels.
  • defaultFontPath: absolute path to a TTF to load and register under the "system" family. Empty leaves the font table empty; drawText becomes a no-op.

Output: a ready-to-use canvas. Pair with present(canvas) once per frame to ship pixels to the SDL window.

proc newSdlSubCanvas(parent: SdlCanvas; w, h: int): SdlSubCanvas {.
    ...raises: [PixieError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Builds a child sub-canvas backed by its own Pixie image. The texture is created lazily on first composite. Fonts are shared from parent so text inside the boundary renders without each layer carrying its own font table. 
proc present(c: SdlCanvas) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Push the Pixie image into the SDL streaming texture, copy the texture to the renderer's window, and call SDL_RenderPresent. Call once per rendered frame after all draw calls have run. Performs a per-pixel RGBA->ARGB swizzle in the process. 
proc resize(c: SdlCanvas; w, h: int) {....raises: [PixieError], tags: [],
                                       forbids: [].}
Resizes the canvas to w x h pixels. Allocates a new Pixie image and a new SDL streaming texture. Call when the window resize event arrives.

Methods

method clear(c: SdlCanvas; color: uint32) {....raises: [PixieError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
method clear(s: SdlSubCanvas; color: uint32) {....raises: [PixieError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}

    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}

                          size: geom.Size) {....raises: [PixieError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}

    tags: [], forbids: [].}
method drawCircle(c: SdlCanvas; center: geom.Offset; radius: float32;
                  fill: uint32) {....raises: [PixieError], tags: [RootEffect],
                                  forbids: [].}
method drawCircle(s: SdlSubCanvas; center: geom.Offset; radius: float32;
                  fill: uint32) {....raises: [PixieError], tags: [RootEffect],
                                  forbids: [].}
method drawImage(c: SdlCanvas; image: pointer; src, dst: geom.Rect) {.
    ...raises: [PixieError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Draws a Pixie image from the image pointer (cast from a Pixie Image ref) into the dst rect, taking the src sub-rect. Uses Pixie's draw with a translate+scale matrix to handle non-1:1 scaling. 
method drawLine(c: SdlCanvas; p0, p1: geom.Offset; color: uint32; width: float32) {.
    ...raises: [PixieError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
method drawLine(s: SdlSubCanvas; p0, p1: geom.Offset; color: uint32;
                width: float32) {....raises: [PixieError], tags: [RootEffect],
                                  forbids: [].}
method drawRect(c: SdlCanvas; r: geom.Rect; fill: uint32) {.
    ...raises: [PixieError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
method drawRect(s: SdlSubCanvas; r: geom.Rect; fill: uint32) {.
    ...raises: [PixieError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
method drawRRect(c: SdlCanvas; r: geom.RRect; fill: uint32) {.
    ...raises: [PixieError, KeyError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
method drawRRect(s: SdlSubCanvas; r: geom.RRect; fill: uint32) {.
    ...raises: [PixieError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
method drawText(c: SdlCanvas; text: string; pos: geom.Offset; color: uint32;
                fontSize: float32; fontFamily: string) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, PixieError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
method drawText(s: SdlSubCanvas; text: string; pos: geom.Offset; color: uint32;
                fontSize: float32; fontFamily: string) {....raises: [PixieError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
method fillPolygon(c: SdlCanvas; points: seq[geom.Offset]; fill: uint32) {.
    ...raises: [PixieError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
method fillPolygon(s: SdlSubCanvas; points: seq[geom.Offset]; fill: uint32) {.
    ...raises: [PixieError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
